name: East West Petroleum Corp.
description: East West Petroleum Corp. is a Canada-based junior energy company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of oil and gas properties. The company holds interest in producing petroleum properties in the Taranaki Basin of New Zealand, as well as exploration assets in other international jurisdictions. East West Petroleum operates through joint ventures and partnerships to advance its portfolio of oil and gas assets, aiming to generate shareholder value through strategic exploration and production activities.
